subject: english
learning_objectives: Use both auxiliaries correctly in sentences

sections.heading: Auxiliary 'Will'
sections.content: 'Will' shows simple futurity in the second and third persons, singular and plural. It also shows determination in the first person singular and plural.

sections.heading: Auxiliary 'Would'
sections.content: 'Would' expresses futurity from the standpoint of some past time and is also used to express condition: If I had a car, I would travel very often.
